series_metadata.series_description: Hiring materials and job bid files for ODJFS positions. May contain vacancy postings, personnel requisitions, position description, applications(HC and electronic), resumes, test questions, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3-6 monthsafter decision is made to fill ornot to fill a position, transfer torecords center for 7 years, thendestroy provided there is nolegal action pending. ; Electronic: Retain in office until no longerof administrative value, thendestroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
